code:
import io
import string
import list

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = words.len()
  while i < n
    match words.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      mut transformed = w
      let wlen = string.len(w)
      if wlen > 0
        match string.byte_at(w, 0)
        when Some(b)
          if b >= 97 and b <= 122
            let upper = b - 32
            let rest = string.substring(w, 1, wlen)
            transformed = "#{string.from_byte(upper)}#{rest}"
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      if i == 0
        result = transformed
      else
        result = "#{result} #{transformed}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
